decision_request.question: Which predefined compiler action should be applied for the availability criterion?

choices.label: Select gap
choices.expected_consequence: Retain the visible Network Gap and do not add an invalid connection.
mandatory_constraints: The choice must remain one of the compiler-authored actions in this request.
The compiler will revalidate all deterministic invariants before changing state.
A mandatory Red invariant cannot be waived by this choice.

choices.label: Terminate this compilation
choices.expected_consequence: Stop this run, preserve the previous valid publication, and require a fresh compilation.
mandatory_constraints: No partial result from this invocation may be published.
A later attempt must start a fresh compilation.

choices.expected_consequence: Retain the visible Network Gap and do not add an invalid connection.

A mandatory Red invariant cannot be waived by this choice.
